creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251986
Support multiple exports options separated by ';'s for current ZFS code

This patch should apply to freebsd-current and most
recent freebsd source trees.
I have made a pull request for OpenZFS to pull/adopt it.
(I cannot say if or how long it might take to find its
 way into the FreeBSD source tree.)

Btw, anyone can do a pull request for OpenZFS. All it
takes is a github login.
